title: World Cup Special - BestBlogs
fetched: raw-HTML 直抓 + 抽取(html:paragraphs) + 清洗（逐字、未经任何模型/改写/翻译）
original_text:
Ecuador take on Germany in Group E at the 2026 World Cup. Previews, Prophet's call and odds snapshots keep updating until kick-off.

普神：押了德国赢，当 VAR 吹掉那个点球的瞬间，这注就输了——德国那天心思不在这里。

Had Germany at 61.7%, reasonable on paper. But this was a rotated Germany squad — already through as Group E leaders with 6 pts — playing without full intent. The Havertz VAR non-penalty reversal broke German momentum at the worst time. Plata's 78-minute winner sealed it. The 'upset' was partly illusory: a fully-motivated Germany likely wins. Concede the loss, but note the market mispriced rotation risk.
_note: 网页赛报正文逐字留底（已去直播/电视/版权/导航杂讯）。
